steps.title: Compare the wing descriptions
steps.content: The first sentence describes many butterflies as having bold, brightly colored wings. The next sentence introduces butterflies with almost colorless, transparent wings. The second idea contrasts with the first rather than adding a similar example or restating it.

steps.title: Choose the contrast signal
steps.content: Choice A signals similarity, which does not fit opposite wing traits. Choice B gives a time relationship, and choice C signals restatement. The transition must show contrast between colorful wings and transparent wings. The answer is D.
